gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 125, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)

gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 126, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)

nEstado128 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked

IF nEstado124=1 AND nEstado125=1 AND nEstado126=1 AND nEstado127=1 AND nEstado128=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado124=0 AND nEstado125=0 AND nEstado126=0 AND nEstado127=0 AND nEstado128=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado124=1 OR nEstado125=1 OR nEstado126=1 OR nEstado127=1 OR nEstado128=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
